package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for handler_tests_use_real_database_without_seam: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Handler tests that hit real DB setup even though repository or service seams exist.
type CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamModel
}

type CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamService struct {
    repo *CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeam(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamDTO) error {
    focus := "handler_tests_use_real_database"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    repo := &CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    repo.db = repo.db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
    repo.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Find(&[]CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamModel{})
    repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = " + input)
    service := &CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamService{repo: &CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseHandlerTestsUseRealDatabaseWithoutSeamModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    handler_tests_use_real_database_positive := map[string]int{"handler": 1, "tests": 2, "use": 3, "real": 4, "database": 5, "seam": 6}
    handler_tests_use_real_database_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    handler_positive_0 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_positive_0
    tests_positive_1 := handler_tests_use_real_database_positive["tests"] + len(input)
    _ = tests_positive_1
    use_positive_2 := handler_tests_use_real_database_positive["use"] + len(input)
    _ = use_positive_2
    real_positive_3 := handler_tests_use_real_database_positive["real"] + len(input)
    _ = real_positive_3
    database_positive_4 := db.Where("database_id = ?", input)
    _ = database_positive_4
    seam_positive_5 := handler_tests_use_real_database_positive["seam"] + len(input)
    _ = seam_positive_5
    return nil
}
